Reviews.Author: 26u9avvo35
Reviews.Comment: I’d say it’s decent for the 20$, not bad at all and I’d recommend it to some people. I don’t look at the developers too keenly however and I’d rather take its competitors over photon personally.

Categories.Comment: Aimbot is good, has great customizability however some of it is weird/acts weird. Some  customizablity for the aimbot doesn’t work as intended.
Has good clean visuals, I like the minimal style. Calm to the eyes.
Primordial menu, I don’t like when copied/stolen menus are used for a different product
Uptime is good, I notice it has somewhat of high cpu but crashes don’t happen that often.
Solid good features, good lua environment but some don’t work well like anti aim, underground etc, it’s more quantity over quality and stuff isn’t executed properly.
The combat options are really good, there is a lot of customisation you can do with the aimbot and also has some neat features with prediction.
Clean modular visuals, has what's necessary and some bonuses like highlight chams.
The photon interface is one of my favourite external uis, i'd say it's really easy to navigate if you use it for 10 minutes and I have no issues with it.
These dudes are insane, they basically instantly update whenever roblox updates and they reimburse any lost time. I never crash with photon either.
decent features overall, some aren't executed properly, has a nice lua vm with a memory api and a few movement features.

Reviews.Author: sml8z43h8
Reviews.Comment: Overall, this is the best external product I've ever used, and the only con for this is that SOMETIMES it crashes when overly using exploits

Categories.Comment: This is my go-to external. If I got to pick an external software for Roblox, it's just got everything you need: aimbot, visuals, exploits, and more

Honestly, I've never seen such beautiful visuals, all of its options, health bar, player name, distance, and more are so customizable, and they can be dragged to where you want in the ESP preview, and the chams are just like the Roblox highlight feature, which is just amazing
Really good looking and unique UI, nothing to say about this
Whenever Roblox updates, it typically just takes 30 minutes to 1 hour to get updated to the current Roblox version

Photon got a ton of unique and useful features, like freecam, fling, watch players, teleport to players, a tick rate increase, DeSync, Cframe, Velocity, position speed, and fly, radar, a fflag editor, dex explorer, Streamproof menu accent changer, self-destroy, velocity, and aimbot indicator, wallcheck, waypoints and many more

Reviews.Author: 101n3g45rw
Reviews.Comment:
Just the best cheat I've played with(matcha, ronin, matrix, blueberry, vector, severe), 
good and fast support, diverse features, beautiful visuals, and of course there is a good optimization (not like in the matcha) 10/10

Reviews.Author: rtx1zufg2
Reviews.Comment: Not the best universal external, but certainly the best external for Rivals, Dahood, & maybe the 2nd or 3rd best in Phantom forces. What really stands out with Photon is its silent aim, it is one of the only externals to have working silent aim for rivals.

Categories.Comment: I have every external and I mean every external pretty much (serotonin, matcha, yerba, matrix, severe and now photon thankfully). Yet somehow, Photon External wipes the floor with every external I've used so far, the lock is extremely smooth the esp runs extremely well on low end devices and the customisabillity is insane, YES the ui is skidded off primordial and YES we dont care this UI is sexy as always . Additionally, photon has some rare features you wouldnt see on many other externals like skybox changer, fflag editor, wallcheck, flickbot, when configured right the aim prediciton is extremely accurate.

Sexy, skidded UI from primordial however the UI does infact look the best out of any other UI I've used so who cares. Taking off one star due to a lack of originality, a 5 star UI would be for example severe as it has some originality to it whilst looking clean.

Very easy to use, the discord is very helpful in seeing what each feature does but majority of the features are self explanatory. The interface however can be confusing for many as many things such as draw fov are located in visuals instead of aimbot like most externals.
Its always the first external to go up when I look on weao.

Perfect amount of features, not so overkill like severe and not so lackluster in features like yerba or ronin, just the perfect balance. The UI being easy to navigate and the clear category headings and icons make it easy to configure the cheat even if there was an insane amount of features. Out of every external I've used its the 2nd most feature rich, severe was the 1st in my opinion in terms of features that would actually benefit the user but in terms of those features actually being good in severe they usually weren't, for example fly automatically gives you noclip this is a nightmare for games like rivals as high fly speeds will put you out of bounds and kill you.

Reviews.Author: 1aip9bwwxl
Reviews.Comment: Best external on the market, user-friendly and $20 lifetime, which is an extremely good deal for the product you are getting

Categories.Comment: gooooodgoodgood
ok, clean, user friendly
sexy primordial UI, extremely easy to navigate
pretty stable, almost no crashes whatsoever
has all essentials, desync is fairly good and clean but is not very feature-rich

Reviews.Author: 2voor8zwl
Reviews.Comment: greatest aimbot and aim features out there with ton of misc uses and best universal external can be used however  you like with a 9/10 visual experience for 20 dollars lifetime

Categories.Comment: greatest aimbot and aim features out there with ton of misc uses and best universal external can be used however  you like with a 9/10 visual experience for 20 dollars lifetime

Reviews.Author: 283czm4nyi
Reviews.Comment: Overall, just the best and reliable Lifetime external for legit/closet cheating but also semi raging. The 20€ Lifetime price is honestly worth it when features like Wallcheck are available and working as intended...

Categories.Comment: Really smooth and highly customizable/modular Aimbot Types, Silent Aim, and Triggerbot works really well on FPS Games. All works great with Wallcheck and Prediction Methods.

Lots of Visual Options. First one to do Engine Chams. Highly Customizable Player ESP; changeable visual texts positions, custom box dimensions. Along with fairly versatile World, misc Client Visuals and a Custom Font System.

Pretty much just Primordial UI. But it's still a great looking interface & easy to use and navigate, Doesn't feel crammed/way too much going on. The best looking, modular Watermark out there. Wish the UI could be dynamically resizable tho.

Always one of the first to get updated after a roblox update. Doesn't  fake update messages on status trackers like weao.  Any bugs/issues consistently get worked on and fixed fairly quickly. Really fast support.

Really good Lua API that isn't talked about enough, comparable to other certain externals, many well made scripts by the community. 
Not much exploits but there's features like Antiaim and Tickrate, also was the only cheat with a Serversided Desync after a patch.
js goat.
